title: BL00DRED! [16x]
description: Red themed resource pack for 1.8.9 PvP, based on Xe.
body:
## BL00DRED!

I polished this resource pack for a long time. It suits Practice, including Nodebuff, Boxing, Sumo and many other.

You may view Gallery for more information of this resource pack. Unfortunally, I cannot provide the latest view of it since I lost the savefile. 

### FAQ

Q: Can I use this resource pack in my videos?

A: Of course! However, please attach the link of this page in the video description. If you don't want to, that's okay.

Q: How can I support you?

A: Thanks for supporting! You can make videos about this resource pack (free ads). Currently, there is no way to donate.
